heading: Stun'Sail Boom vs Sultana Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Stun'Sail Boom, South Australia and Sultana Point, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stun'Sail Boom has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Sultana Point (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Stun'Sail Boom or Sultana Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Stun'Sail Boom has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Sultana Point scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Stun'Sail Boom scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Sultana Point scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Stun'Sail Boom or Sultana Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stun'Sail Boom has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
